body:
Charles,

Got the draft agenda for Tuesday's hearing. Sage Creek and Pronghorn Valley are both up first. You still want to lead off on the busing numbers?

Barbara
snippet: Charles,\n\nGot the draft agenda for Tuesday's hearing. Sage Creek and P...
subject: Consolidation hearing agenda

body:
Barbara,

I'll take the busing numbers. Got the mileage worked up. The roads past Pronghorn aren't fit for an hour each way come January.

Charles
snippet: Barbara,\n\nI'll take the busing numbers. Got the mileage worked up. The...
subject: Re: Consolidation hearing agenda

body:
Charles,

The packet for Thursday's meeting is posted. You'll see the administration is formally recommending the board approve consolidating Sage Creek and Pronghorn Valley into one building. Our office projects it saves the district about two hundred ten thousand a year, and I'll be asking the board to vote yes. Enrollment figures and the maintenance bids are in there too. Holler if the file won't open.

Gary
snippet: Charles,\n\nThe packet for Thursday's meeting is posted. You'll see the ad...
subject: Board packet for Thursday

body:
Gary,

Opened fine. I'll have it read before Thursday. The Pronghorn roof bid looks high to me.

Charles
snippet: Gary,\n\nOpened fine. I'll have it read before Thursday. The Pronghorn r...
subject: Re: Board packet for Thursday

body: Two bids came in on the roof. We'll talk it through Thursday.\n\nGary
snippet: Two bids came in on the roof. We'll talk it through Thursday.\n\nGary
subject: Re: Board packet for Thursday

body:
Charles,

We've got eleven families signed up for public comment at the next meeting, most from the Sage Creek side. Want me to set a time limit?

Maria
snippet: Charles,\n\nWe've got eleven families signed up for public comment at th...
subject: Public comment sign-ups

body:
Maria,

Three minutes each, same as always. Folks drove a long way to be heard. Don't cut them short.

Charles
snippet: Maria,\n\nThree minutes each, same as always. Folks drove a long way to ...
subject: Re: Public comment sign-ups

body: Three minutes it is.\n\nMaria
snippet: Three minutes it is.\n\nMaria
subject: Re: Public comment sign-ups

body: One more thing. Book the church basement in case the courthouse room runs too small.\n\nCharles
snippet: One more thing. Book the church basement in case the courthouse room run...
subject: Re: Public comment sign-ups

body:
Charles,

The state board training is the second weekend in March. They'll cover the consolidation rules. You planning to make the drive?

Barbara
snippet: Charles,\n\nThe state board training is the second weekend in March. The...
subject: School board training in Cheyenne

body:
Barbara,

I'll go. Long haul to Cheyenne but worth knowing the rules before we vote. I'll drive down Friday.

Charles
snippet: Barbara,\n\nI'll go. Long haul to Cheyenne but worth knowing the rules b...
subject: Re: School board training in Cheyenne

body: Good. I'll ride along if there's room.\n\nBarbara
snippet: Good. I'll ride along if there's room.\n\nBarbara

body: Room for you and a thermos. Leaving at six.\n\nCharles
snippet: Room for you and a thermos. Leaving at six.\n\nCharles

body:
Dad,

Katie and I are driving down from Sheridan Saturday, bringing the kids. Need anything from town?

Robert
snippet: Dad,\n\nKatie and I are driving down from Sheridan Saturday, bringing th...
subject: Coming down this weekend

body:
Robert,

Bring a bag of that coffee I like. Duke'll be glad of the kids. Roads are clear for now.

Dad
snippet: Robert,\n\nBring a bag of that coffee I like. Duke'll be glad of the kid...
subject: Re: Coming down this weekend

body:
Dad,

Haven't heard from you in a week. How's calving going? Everything alright out there?

Sarah
snippet: Dad,\n\nHaven't heard from you in a week. How's calving going? Everythin...
subject: Checking in on you

body:
Sarah,

Calving's slow this year. Lost one heifer, the rest are fine. Cold, but nothing the herd can't handle. I'm fine.

Dad
snippet: Sarah,\n\nCalving's slow this year. Lost one heifer, the rest are fine. ...
subject: Re: Checking in on you

body: Glad to hear it. Call if you need an extra pair of hands.\n\nSarah
snippet: Glad to hear it. Call if you need an extra pair of hands.\n\nSarah
subject: Re: Checking in on you

body:
Dad,

We want to do brunch for your birthday Sunday. I'll cook, the whole bunch is coming. That alright with you?

Sarah
snippet: Dad,\n\nWe want to do brunch for your birthday Sunday. I'll cook, the wh...
subject: Your birthday Sunday

body:
Sarah,

No fuss needed, but I won't turn down a meal I didn't cook. Sunday's fine. I'll bring Duke.

Dad
snippet: Sarah,\n\nNo fuss needed, but I won't turn down a meal I didn't cook. Su...
subject: Re: Your birthday Sunday

body: No fuss, just family. Ten o'clock.\n\nSarah
snippet: No fuss, just family. Ten o'clock.\n\nSarah
subject: Re: Your birthday Sunday

body: I'll be there at ten. Tell the kids I said hello.\n\nDad
snippet: I'll be there at ten. Tell the kids I said hello.\n\nDad
subject: Re: Your birthday Sunday

body:
Charles,

The district liability policy renews in March and the premium's up again. The board needs to approve before the deadline. Can you look the numbers over?

Gary
snippet: Charles,\n\nThe district liability policy renews in March and the premiu...
subject: District insurance renewal

body:
Gary,

Send me the comparison. We shouldn't pay more to insure two half-empty buildings than we did for full ones. That's the whole argument.

Charles
snippet: Gary,\n\nSend me the comparison. We shouldn't pay more to insure two hal...
subject: Re: District insurance renewal

body: Comparison's attached. We'll go over it at the meeting.\n\nGary
snippet: Comparison's attached. We'll go over it at the meeting.\n\nGary
subject: Re: District insurance renewal

body: Got it. The Sage Creek line item is the one to watch.\n\nCharles
snippet: Got it. The Sage Creek line item is the one to watch.\n\nCharles
subject: Re: District insurance renewal

body:
Charles,

The feed store called about the last load of hay. Said the invoice went to you. Want Robert to settle it next time we're down?

Katie
snippet: Charles,\n\nThe feed store called about the last load of hay. Said the i...
subject: Feed store invoice

body:
Katie,

I'll handle it. Tell them I'll be in town Friday. The hay was light this cutting so the bill's no surprise.

Charles
snippet: Katie,\n\nI'll handle it. Tell them I'll be in town Friday. The hay was ...
subject: Re: Feed store invoice

body:
Dad,

Found the hydraulic part for the old Ford up in Billings. They'll ship it or I can grab it next trip. Which do you want?

Robert
snippet: Dad,\n\nFound the hydraulic part for the old Ford up in Billings. They'l...
subject: That tractor part

body:
Robert,

Grab it. Shipping costs more than the part and I'm in no hurry till the ground thaws. Thanks.

Dad
snippet: Robert,\n\nGrab it. Shipping costs more than the part and I'm in no hurr...
subject: Re: That tractor part

body: Will do. I'll bring it down with the kids.\n\nRobert
snippet: Will do. I'll bring it down with the kids.\n\nRobert
subject: Re: That tractor part

body:
Charles,

I drafted the letter to Sage Creek and Pronghorn families about the timeline. Want your eyes on it before it goes out. Plain language, no jargon.

Maria
snippet: Charles,\n\nI drafted the letter to Sage Creek and Pronghorn families ab...
subject: Draft letter to families

body:
Maria,

I'll read it tonight. Tell folks the truth straight. They can smell a sugar-coated letter from a mile off.

Charles
snippet: Maria,\n\nI'll read it tonight. Tell folks the truth straight. They can ...
subject: Re: Draft letter to families

body: Straight it is. Thanks, Charles.\n\nMaria

subject: Re: Draft letter to families

body: One change. Put the meeting date up top where they'll see it.\n\nCharles
snippet: One change. Put the meeting date up top where they'll see it.\n\nCharles
subject: Re: Draft letter to families

body:
Dad,

Thinking of sending Hannah up to the ranch for a few days over spring break. She's been asking about Duke. That work for you?

Sarah
snippet: Dad,\n\nThinking of sending Hannah up to the ranch for a few days over s...
subject: Spring break visit

body:
Sarah,

Send her up. Duke could use the company and so could I. I'll put her to work feeding in the mornings.

Dad
snippet: Sarah,\n\nSend her up. Duke could use the company and so could I. I'll p...
subject: Re: Spring break visit

body: She'll love that. I'll drive her up the 14th.\n\nSarah
snippet: She'll love that. I'll drive her up the 14th.\n\nSarah
subject: Re: Spring break visit

body: The 14th works. Roads should be clear by then.\n\nDad
snippet: The 14th works. Roads should be clear by then.\n\nDad
subject: Re: Spring break visit

body:
Dad,

When are you branding this year? I'll take time off and bring James in if he can swing it. Don't try to do it shorthanded again.

Robert
snippet: Dad,\n\nWhen are you branding this year? I'll take time off and bring Ja...

Robert,

Once the weather settles. I'll give you the date. And I wasn't shorthanded, I had Duke.

Dad

subject: Re: Branding help this spring

snippet: Will do. I'll bring it down with the kids.\n\nRobert

body:
Charles,

I drafted the letter to Sage Creek and Pronghorn families about the timeline. Want your eyes on it before it goes out. Plain language, no jargon.

Maria
snippet: Charles,\n\nI drafted the letter to Sage Creek and Pronghorn families ab...
subject: Draft letter to families

body:
Maria,

I'll read it tonight. Tell folks the truth straight. They can smell a sugar-coated letter from a mile off.

Charles
snippet: Maria,\n\nI'll read it tonight. Tell folks the truth straight. They can ...
subject: Re: Draft letter to families

body: Straight it is. Thanks, Charles.\n\nMaria
snippet: Straight it is. Thanks, Charles.\n\nMaria
subject: Re: Draft letter to families

body: One change. Put the meeting date up top where they'll see it.\n\nCharles
snippet: One change. Put the meeting date up top where they'll see it.\n\nCharles
subject: Re: Draft letter to families

body:
Dad,

Thinking of sending Hannah up to the ranch for a few days over spring break. She's been asking about Duke. That work for you?

Sarah
snippet: Dad,\n\nThinking of sending Hannah up to the ranch for a few days over s...
subject: Spring break visit

body:
Sarah,

Send her up. Duke could use the company and so could I. I'll put her to work feeding in the mornings.

Dad
snippet: Sarah,\n\nSend her up. Duke could use the company and so could I. I'll p...
subject: Re: Spring break visit

body: She'll love that. I'll drive her up the 14th.\n\nSarah
snippet: She'll love that. I'll drive her up the 14th.\n\nSarah
subject: Re: Spring break visit

body: The 14th works. Roads should be clear by then.\n\nDad
snippet: The 14th works. Roads should be clear by then.\n\nDad
subject: Re: Spring break visit

body:
Dad,

When are you branding this year? I'll take time off and bring James in if he can swing it. Don't try to do it shorthanded again.

Robert
snippet: Dad,\n\nWhen are you branding this year? I'll take time off and bring Ja...
subject: Branding help this spring

body:
Robert,

Once the weather settles. I'll give you the date. And I wasn't shorthanded, I had Duke.

Dad
snippet: Robert,\n\nOnce the weather settles. I'll give you the date. And I wasn'...
subject: Re: Branding help this spring

body:
Dad,

Got four days off the rotation. Thinking of driving up to the ranch this weekend to help with whatever needs doing. Weather look alright?

James
snippet: Dad,\n\nGot four days off the rotation. Thinking of driving up to the ra...
subject: Got a few days off

body:
James,

Come on up. Forecast says cold and clear, the first real snow might hold off. Plenty of fence needs walking. Bring gloves.

Dad
snippet: James,\n\nCome on up. Forecast says cold and clear, the first real snow ...
subject: Re: Got a few days off

body: See you Saturday. I'll bring elk steaks.\n\nJames
snippet: See you Saturday. I'll bring elk steaks.\n\nJames
subject: Re: Got a few days off

body:
Charles,

Got the draft agenda for Tuesday's hearing. Sage Creek and Pronghorn Valley are both up first. You still want to lead off on the busing numbers?

Barbara
snippet: Charles,\n\nGot the draft agenda for Tuesday's hearing. Sage Creek and P...
subject: Consolidation hearing agenda

body:
Barbara,

I'll take the busing numbers. Got the mileage worked up. The roads past Pronghorn aren't fit for an hour each way come January.

Charles
snippet: Barbara,\n\nI'll take the busing numbers. Got the mileage worked up. The...
subject: Re: Consolidation hearing agenda

body:
Charles,

The packet for Thursday's meeting is posted. You'll see the administration is formally recommending the board approve consolidating Sage Creek and Pronghorn Valley into one building. Our office projects it saves the district about two hundred ten thousand a year, and I'll be asking the board to vote yes. Enrollment figures and the maintenance bids are in there too. Holler if the file won't open.

Gary
snippet: Charles,\n\nThe packet for Thursday's meeting is posted. You'll see the ad...
subject: Board packet for Thursday

body:
Gary,

Opened fine. I'll have it read before Thursday. The Pronghorn roof bid looks high to me.

Charles
snippet: Gary,\n\nOpened fine. I'll have it read before Thursday. The Pronghorn r...
subject: Re: Board packet for Thursday

body: Two bids came in on the roof. We'll talk it through Thursday.\n\nGary
snippet: Two bids came in on the roof. We'll talk it through Thursday.\n\nGary
subject: Re: Board packet for Thursday

body:
Charles,

We've got eleven families signed up for public comment at the next meeting, most from the Sage Creek side. Want me to set a time limit?

Maria
snippet: Charles,\n\nWe've got eleven families signed up for public comment at th...

body:
Maria,

Three minutes each, same as always. Folks drove a long way to be heard. Don't cut them short.

Charles
snippet: Maria,\n\nThree minutes each, same as always. Folks drove a long way to ...

body: Three minutes it is.\n\nMaria

The state board training is the second weekend in March. They'll cover the consolidation rules. You planning to make the drive?

Barbara
snippet: Charles,\n\nThe state board training is the second weekend in March. The...

I'll go. Long haul to Cheyenne but worth knowing the rules before we vote. I'll drive down Friday.

Charles
snippet: Barbara,\n\nI'll go. Long haul to Cheyenne but worth knowing the rules b...
